For

Larry "Harris" Taylor, Ph.D.

Diving Safety Coordinator

University of Michigan

Ann Arbor, Michigan

Email:  divegeek

    

 

Total Links = 9173    Last Additions On: 3 / 26 / 25    Last Entire List Dead Links Removal: 10 / 4 / 2024

Maximum  Monthly Download of this file: 15,390  

I get more than 400 spams a day (all from people protecting my privacy)

So, I have neither the time (This page is < 0.1% of my stuff), nor desire, to respond to requests for addition to my list. 

I will simply add the requested sites as time allows.
